_doc: Presets visuels par tier musical. Chaque entrée définit le prompt Leonardo (fond), la couleur signature de bordure, et le style typographique. Tu peux éditer librement les prompts pour affiner l'esthétique.

reggae.leonardo_prompt: warm sunset reggae lofi atmosphere, tropical balcony at dusk, soft palm tree silhouettes, golden hour light, gentle smoke haze, warm amber and orange tones, cinematic depth of field, no text, no people faces, atmospheric, immersive, dreamy, painterly digital art style
reggae.leonardo_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, words, letters, signs, blurry, low quality, deformed, cluttered, busy

default_usage_modifiers.studying: , desk with open book in soft foreground blur, warm lamp light
default_usage_modifiers.sleeping: , late night, deep dark warm tones, peaceful
default_usage_modifiers.focus: , minimal composition, single light source, calm
default_usage_modifiers.relaxing: , hammock or lounging vibe, golden light

world.leonardo_prompt: cinematic mountain landscape at golden hour, silhouette of traditional instrument, soft mist, ethereal atmosphere, deep warm gold and amber tones, painterly digital art, immersive depth, no text, no logos, contemplative meditative mood
world.leonardo_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, words, letters, signs, modern buildings, cars, blurry, low quality, deformed

default_usage_modifiers.meditation: , solo meditative figure silhouette, dawn light
default_usage_modifiers.studying: , scholarly atmosphere, ancient scrolls hint, soft warm light
default_usage_modifiers.sleeping: , twilight transition, deep blue gold gradient sky

afro.leonardo_prompt: modern African urban nightscape, neon purple and magenta lights, architecture silhouettes, rain reflections on street, cinematic depth, atmospheric haze, deep purple and electric magenta tones, futuristic afro house aesthetic, no text, no logos, no faces, immersive
afro.leonardo_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, words, letters, signs, faces, crowds, blurry, low quality, deformed, cartoon

default_usage_modifiers.focus: , clean architectural lines, single neon accent, minimalist
default_usage_modifiers.studying: , late night cafe window scene, neon glow, books hinted
default_usage_modifiers.party: , deeper neon saturation, more atmospheric haze
default_usage_modifiers.driving: , street perspective, road lights leading into distance

latin.leonardo_prompt: Latin chill terrace at evening, bougainvillea flowers in soft foreground, warm golden light, mediterranean or caribbean atmosphere, painterly cinematic depth, rose and amber and coral tones, immersive romantic atmosphere, no text, no logos, no faces
latin.leonardo_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, words, letters, signs, faces, blurry, low quality, deformed, cartoon

default_usage_modifiers.relaxing: , hammock or balcony view, soft breeze feel
default_usage_modifiers.studying: , desk on terrace, open book, warm lamp

maghreb.leonardo_prompt: desert at blue hour, oud instrument silhouette, moorish architecture archways in distance, soft mist, sand dunes, deep teal and gold tones, contemplative spiritual atmosphere, painterly cinematic, no text, no logos, no faces, ethereal calm
maghreb.leonardo_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, words, letters, signs, arabic calligraphy, faces, blurry, low quality, deformed, cartoon

default_usage_modifiers.meditation: , solo silhouette in prayer pose, dawn light
default_usage_modifiers.studying: , ancient manuscript hint, soft oil lamp
default_usage_modifiers.sleeping: , deep night sky, stars visible, peaceful
